title: agastache rugosa f. hypoleuca
intro: Agastache rugosa f. hypoleuca, also known as Purple Giant Hyssop, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, native to East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Agastache rugosa f. hypoleuca include reducing inflammation and pain, improving respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system. Agastache rugosa f. hypoleuca can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice for natural remedies.
